items.title: The Winter Olympics are hurting main street in Livigno's duty-free mountain enclave
items.description: Organizers of the 2026 Winter Olympics are betting that the event will lure more tourists to northern Italy for years to come

items.title: Edmunds Top Rated vehicle awards for 2026

items.title: UK interest rate cut expected in March after inflation drop
items.description: Inflation in the U.K. has fallen to a 10-month low largely on the back of lower food and gas prices

items.title: World shares, US futures gain as most Asian markets stay closed for Lunar New Year holidays
items.description: World shares and U.S. futures are higher, with Japan's benchmark gaining more than 1%

items.title: From automated farm tractors to exam paper grading, AI boosts efficiency for some in India
items.description: Artificial intelligence is spreading fast across India, and people already use it to work quicker and cheaper
